ops.title: Phase 2 handoff: journey engine core (v2)
ops.body:
# Phase 2 handoff — journey engine core (A1–A4), 2026-07-13

Modules: trips.py/sweeps.py/shortlist.py rewritten; fit.py NEW; constants.py retrieval region. 145 tests green in scope (test_trips 74, test_compile 13, test_checkpoints 12, test_sweeps 17, test_shortlist 14, test_fit 15); helpers sweep_envelope/shortlist_doc in cli/tests/_api.py.

## API changes downstream phases must absorb
- `phase_done(slug, key, quota_after=None, now, inputs_fp=None)` — the positional `artifacts: list[str]` param is GONE; unknown node id raises UsageError. (factors.py:261/:347 called the old form.)
- Plan shape: no top-level `max_finalists`/`max_hybrids`; `max_hybrids` lives under `hybrid`. PLAN_KEYS = {trip_type, origins, buckets, program_sweeps, hybrid, sources, preferences, constraints, return, lodging}.
- Shortlist candidates are all-cabin `(id, cabin)` pairs with no seat/mileage/cabin gate at shortlist time — sufficiency and mileage are rank-time facts on expanded rows.
- `journey_fit(trip, prefs_doc, legs, now) -> {fit_facts, preference_misses}` (fit.py) with legs=[{role, detail, source, fetched_at?}] — consume, don't recompute; preference_misses are mandatory at render.
- `compile_graph(slug)` already declares expand/assess/rank/finalize nodes (ids key checkpoints); executors are Phase 3's. Artifact writers must match or register a validator in `artifact_write` (write-boundary schemas).
- Sweep artifact is a JSON envelope {provenance, search_states, rows} at legs/<role>/sweep-<label>.json (.json, NOT .jsonl). Sweeps inherit Phase 4b quota (QuotaFloorError → not_run).
- Store disjointness: DISJOINT_DURABLE_PREF_KEYS / DISJOINT_TRIP_DOC_KEYS in constants.py; trip-doc write path enforces; prefs side consumes the latter.

## Phase 8 doc deltas
planning.md + SKILL.md flows/CLI map: trip_type + constraints/preferences{value, priority} model; trip compile/explain node graph; lazy return-endpoint resolution (outbound shortlist ∪ onward_dests); sweep artifact is a .json envelope; local-wall-clock time-model doctrine (endpoint-local dates, TotalDuration elapsed); new ## Journeys and ## Hotels sections. CLI surface: trip compile/explain; status/resume/phase-done reworked (phase-done dropped --artifact); sweep plan / sweep run <slug> <key> [--refresh] [--quota-floor]; shortlist run --leg outbound|return [--gateway]; shortlist onward.
ops.when: Implementing getaway v2 Phase 3 (composition/rank), Phase 5 (walker), or the Phase 8 docs sweep — the Phase-2 agent's API changes and doc deltas.
